text:
/usr/ports/games/halflifeserver: new version of hlds is out. removed the included
counterstrike mod with this port because the name of port halflifeserver should
only install half life dedicated server package and make mods to hlds for example
counterstrike optional and i will submit seperate ports for the counterstrike and
popular frontline force mod later.

Fix: uuencoded, gzip'd tarball diff output.
